title: Add a handle_info/2 catch-all
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/events_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.EventsLive) with two handle_info/2 clauses: one that matches {:event, payload} and appends payload to @events, and a second catch-all clause that matches _msg and returns {:noreply, socket} without crashing. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :events, [])}.
tier_rationale: Canonical catch-all pattern. Single-clause add to prevent unhandled-message crashes.
